title: linum bahamense var. corallicola
intro: Linum bahamense var. corallicola, also known as Bahamian yellow flax or coral prickly poppy, is a variety of the Linum bahamense plant, a flowering plant native to the Bahamas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Linum bahamense var. corallicola include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and supporting wound healing, making it a potential treatment for various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
